subject: Docs Audit — Broken Links, Missing Images, Orphaned Pages
body:
## Documentation Audit Report

**Scope:** `docs/` folder — all58Markdown files  
**Checked:** internal links, external links, image references, orphaned pages, accuracy

---

## 1. Broken Internal Links

> **Severity: Warning** — readers will hit404 pages

| File | Section | Target | Problem |
|---|---|---|---|
| `concepts/documentation-panel.md` | `## Next` | `getting-started/installation.md` | Missing `../` prefix — resolves to `concepts/getting-started/installation.md` (does not exist) |
| `concepts/documentation-panel.md` | `## Next` | `getting-started/first-run.md` | Missing `../` prefix — resolves to `concepts/getting-started/first-run.md` (does not exist) |
| `features/fullscreen-transcript.md` | `## Related` | `view-modes.md` | Target `features/view-modes.md` does not exist |
| `features/README.md` | `## What You'll Find Here` | `../panels/loop-panel.md` | File is named `panels/Loop.md`, not `loop-panel.md` |
| `features/README.md` | `## What You'll Find Here` | `../panels/tasks-panel.md` | File is named `panels/Tasks.md`, not `tasks-panel.md` |
| `getting-started/README.md` | `## Next Steps` | `visual-studio-external-tool.md` | File is named `VS Tooling.md`, not `visual-studio-external-tool.md` |
| `panels/Approvals.md` | `## Related` | `loop-panel.md` | File is named `Loop.md`, not `loop-panel.md` |

---

## 2. Broken External Links

> **Severity: Warning** — dead or bot-blocked links

| URL | Status | Files Referencing |
|---|---|---|
| `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` | **404 Not Found** | `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` |
| `https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/10.0` | **403 Forbidden** (bot block) | `getting-started/installation.md`, `getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md` |
| `https://one.dash.cloudflare.com` | **500 Internal Server Error** | `reference/remote-control/setup-cloudflare.md` |

*Note: The GitHub 404 is the highest concern — the releases page may have moved or the repository name changed. The 403 and 500 may be transient/bot-protection and are worth monitoring.*

---

## 3. Missing Images

> **Severity: Warning** — 51 of 73 referenced image files are absent from `docs/images/`

Only 22 images are present on disk. The following files have the most missing images:

| File | Missing Images |
|---|---|
| `features/prompt-queue.md` | 5 (`prompt-queue-tabs.png`, `prompt-queue-tab-nav.png`, `prompt-queue-edit.png`, `prompt-queue-priority-feedback.png`, `prompt-queue-paused.png`) |
| `features/entering-prompts.md` | 4 (`prompt-input-idle.png`, `prompt-input-abort.png`, `prompt-at-intellisense.png`, `prompt-at-accepted.png`) |
| `features/fullscreen-transcript.md` | 3 (`fullscreen-view-menu.png`, `fullscreen-transcript-active.png`, `fullscreen-prompt-peek.png`) |
| `reference/loop-file-custom-ui.md` | 5 (`loop-custom-ui-bool-checkbox.png`, `loop-custom-ui-enum-dropdown.png`, `loop-custom-ui-group-header.png`, `loop-custom-ui-text-input.png`, `loop-custom-ui-full-example.png`) |
| `customization/Tinting and Themes.md` | 3 (`tint-swatches.png`, `tint-menu.png`, `accent-offset-menu.png`) |
| `options/` (6 pages) | 8 total option tab screenshots all missing |
| `concepts/agents.md` | 2 (`agent-cards-main-window.png`, `agent-transcript-multi-open.png`) |
| `concepts/transcripts.md` | 2 (`transcript-panel-layout.png`, `transcript-quick-reply.png`) |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-local.md` | 1 (`../images/rc-qr-code-transcript.png`) |
| `reference/remote-control/setup-ngrok.md` | 1 (`../images/rc-preferences-tunnel.png`) |

Many of these pages include `>📸 Screenshot needed:` placeholder comments, indicating images were planned but never captured.

---

## 4. Orphaned Pages

> **Severity: Info** — no inbound links from the docs tree (not reachable via SUMMARY.md or cross-links)

| Page | Notes |
|---|---|
| `decisions/replay-ui-action-architecture.md` | Architecture decision record — no SUMMARY.md entry, no inbound links |
| `decisions/screenshot-metadata-schema.md` | Architecture decision record — same |
| `features/inbox.md` | Duplicates content with `panels/Inbox.md` (which IS in SUMMARY.md); `features/inbox.md` has `parent: Features` front-matter but is never linked|
| `loop-files/loop-fix-tagged-tasks.md` | Entire `loop-files/` section not in SUMMARY.md; no inbound links |
| `screenshots/README.md` | Screenshot test infrastructure docs — no inbound links |

---

## 5. Accuracy / Structural Issues

> **Severity: Info**

- **`features/inbox.md` vs `panels/Inbox.md`:** Two separate files document the Inbox feature. `panels/Inbox.md` is in `SUMMARY.md` and covers the full panel. `features/inbox.md` covers the same feature from a "Features" perspective with `parent: Features` front-matter (nav_order 11) but is unreachable. This creates a maintenance split — updates must be applied to both, or one should be removed/merged.
- **`panels/Approvals.md` image placeholder:** The screenshot reference `images/descriptive-filename.png` is a placeholder filename (the only image file that actually exists in `docs/images/` happens to be this placeholder). The alt text reads `Screenshot: The Approvals panel allows you to review work performed by the Squad team` but the filename suggests it was never properly named.
- **`SUMMARY.md` structure:** The `Stand-alone Installer` entry appears under the `## Prompts` heading (line 18) rather than `## Getting Started` — appears to be a misplaced entry.

---

## Summary

| Category | Count | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Broken internal links | 7 | Warning |
| Dead/erroring external links | 3 | Warning |
| Missing images | 51 | Warning |
| Orphaned pages | 5 | Info |
| Accuracy/structural issues | 3 | Info |

actions.label: Fix broken internal links
actions.prompt:
Please fix the following broken internal links in the SquadDash docs (D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\docs\). Do not change any other content:

1. `concepts/documentation-panel.md` — `## Next` section: change `getting-started/installation.md` to `../getting-started/installation.md` and `getting-started/first-run.md` to `../getting-started/first-run.md`.

2. `features/fullscreen-transcript.md` — `## Related` section: the link `[View Modes](view-modes.md)` targets a file that does not exist (`features/view-modes.md`). Either remove this link or, if a view-modes page has been created elsewhere, update the path accordingly.

3. `features/README.md` — `## What You'll Find Here` section: change `../panels/loop-panel.md` to `../panels/Loop.md` and `../panels/tasks-panel.md` to `../panels/Tasks.md`.

4. `getting-started/README.md` — `## Next Steps` section: change `visual-studio-external-tool.md` to `VS Tooling.md`.

5. `panels/Approvals.md` — `## Related` section: change `loop-panel.md` to `Loop.md`.

Verify each fix resolves correctly before committing.
actions.hint: Repair7 broken internal cross-references across the docs

actions.label: Fix dead GitHub releases link
actions.prompt: In `docs/getting-started/Stand-alone Installer.md`, there is a link to `https://github.com/bradygaster/SquadDash/releases` that returns 404 Not Found. Please find the correct releases URL for theSquadDash project (check the repository's actual GitHub remote URL — run `git remote -v` in D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public to confirm the repo owner/name) and update the link in the file. Do not change any other content.
actions.hint: The bradygaster/SquadDash releases URL is404 — needs updating

actions.label: Resolve duplicate Inbox docs
actions.prompt:
In theSquadDash docs (D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\docs\), there are two pages documenting the Inbox feature:

1. `panels/Inbox.md` — listed in SUMMARY.md under Panels, covers the full Inbox panel UI.
2. `features/inbox.md` — NOT in SUMMARY.md, has `parent: Features` front-matter (nav_order 11), covers INBOX_MESSAGE_JSON format and agent usage.

Please decide how to resolve this. Options:
- Merge `features/inbox.md` content into `panels/Inbox.md` and delete the orphaned file.
- Add `features/inbox.md` to SUMMARY.md under a suitable heading so it is reachable.
- Convert `features/inbox.md` into a cross-reference to `panels/Inbox.md`.

The `features/inbox.md` file has detailed content about the message format and action buttons that may complement `panels/Inbox.md`. Inspect both files before deciding.
actions.hint: Two docs cover the Inbox — one is orphaned and unreachable

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — no action will be taken
